old_value: {"id":"village-zh4","title":"Implement TaskStore ABC and FileTaskStore","description":"Phase 1: Create village/tasks/ module with models.py (Task, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskStatus dataclasses), store.py (TaskStore ABC + FileTaskStore JSONL backend), ids.py (bd-xxxx ID generation), and __init__.py (get_task_store factory). FileTaskStore uses .village/tasks.jsonl for storage, fcntl file locking for concurrent safety, append-only writes with compaction on delete. {"id":"village-cpn","title":"Implement village/loop.py — spec-driven autonomous build loop","description":"Core loop module with: find_incomplete_specs(specs_dir), check_spec_completion(spec_path), detect_promise(pane_output), monitor_pane(pane_id, timeout), run_loop(specs_dir, parallel=1, max_iterations=None, model=None, dry_run=False). Reads specs/*.md files, tracks completion via Status field, detects promise signals, monitors tmux pane output, retries on failure. Sequential by default, parallel support later.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"github@bkuri.com","created_at":"2026-04-10T20:49:11Z","created_by":"Bernardo Kuri","updated_at":"2026-04-10T20:49:11Z"}
